metadata.description: Product Blueprint — pre-development planning-to-design harness that turns an idea into a production-grade design system without AI slop.

plugins.name: product-blueprint
plugins.description: Guided product planning and production-grade visual design harness: research, PRD, screen contracts, mechanism contracts, storyboards, measured art direction, shadcn/Radix + OKLCH token substrate, impeccable hero-screen craft loop, adversarial anti-slop visual quality gate, and engineering handoff.
